title: evolvulus sericeus f. pedunculatus
intro: Evolvulus sericeus f. pedunculatus, also known as dwarf morning glory, is a plant species within the family Convolvulaceae, characterized by its small, blue or purple flowers and silky, hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus sericeus f. pedunculatus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of asthma, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and confirmed.
